title: i18n — Localisation Settings
description: Controls the default locale, available locales, font override, and date format for this tenant.

default_locale.description: Default locale presented to users who have no personal preference set. 'en' = English, 'dz' = Dzongkha.

available_locales.description: Locales exposed in the Topbar locale switcher. Must include default_locale. Leave empty to show all.

font_override.description: Optional URL to a custom woff2 Dzongkha font hosted locally. Leave blank to use the bundled Jomolhari font.

date_format.description: Date display format across all date fields. 'short' = DD/MM/YYYY, 'long' = DD MMMM YYYY, 'iso' = YYYY-MM-DD.
